# CWE-312 — Cleartext Storage of Sensitive Information (safe) (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-312-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"crypto/aes"
	"crypto/cipher"
	"crypto/rand"
	"encoding/json"
	"io"
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"path/filepath"
)

type patientRecord struct {
	ID         string `json:"id"`
	SSNCipher  []byte `json:"ssn_cipher"`
	SSNNonce   []byte `json:"ssn_nonce"`
}

// Safe: encrypts SSN at rest with AES-GCM before writing to disk.
func StorePatient(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	key := []byte(os.Getenv("DATA_KEY"))
	block, _ := aes.NewCipher(key)
	gcm, _ := cipher.NewGCM(block)
	nonce := make([]byte, gcm.NonceSize())
	_, _ = io.ReadFull(rand.Reader, nonce)
	ciphertext := gcm.Seal(nil, nonce, []byte(r.FormValue("ssn")), nil)
	rec := patientRecord{ID: r.FormValue("id"), SSNCipher: ciphertext, SSNNonce: nonce}
	jsonData, _ := json.Marshal(rec)
	safeID := filepath.Base(rec.ID)
	_ = os.WriteFile("/data/patients/"+safeID+".json", jsonData, 0600)
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusCreated)
}
